---
title: "Publications"
title-block-style: none
pagetitle: "Publications | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Searchable publications, working papers, book chapters and data outputs by Dr Mesfin Genie."
page-layout: full
image: /assets/img/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell"><p class="eyebrow">Publications</p><h1>Publications and research outputs</h1><p class="lead">Search by title, author, journal, theme, year or output type. Years are collapsed to keep the page readable; the latest year is open by default.</p></div></header>
<section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell"><div class="pub-summary"><p><strong><span data-pub-count>44</span></strong> outputs shown</p><p><a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=v2SXM_kAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Google Scholar ↗</a></p></div><div class="pub-toolbar" data-publication-toolbar aria-label="Publication search and filters"></div><p data-pub-empty hidden>No publications match the selected filters.</p>
```

{{< include ../assets/generated/publications-list.html >}}

```{=html}
</div></section>
```
